text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world, such as photos and videos. Two important tasks in this field are image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision systems use cameras to detect road signs, pedestrians, and other vehicles. This helps the car make safe driving decisions. As this technology continues to improve, it is also used in healthcare, security, and manufacturing.
